items.title: Uganda's leading media outlets shut down by army chief

items.title: Intrigue From 17th C. Shipwreck Carrying Moroccan Gold Coins is Solved After 30 Years
items.summary: A shipwreck off the British coast, including a treasure of hundreds of gold coins, has finally been identified after 30 years. The 400-year-old ship discovered off the coast of Devon, England, has now…
